QCV - AI-Powered CV Builder for Egypt & Arab World
===================================================

About
-----
QCV is the leading AI-powered CV builder in Egypt and the Arab world. Build professional ATS-friendly resumes in minutes. Free to start, with Pro and Unlimited plans for advanced features.

Pricing (EGP)
-------------
- Free: 1 CV, 1 template (classic), 1 PDF download, no AI
- 48-Hour Pass: 30 EGP (one-time, full access for 48h)
- Pro: 99 EGP/month or 79 EGP/year (5 CVs, all templates, 5 downloads, AI features)
- Unlimited: 299 EGP/month or 239 EGP/year (unlimited everything, priority support)

Key Features
------------
- 15+ professional ATS-friendly CV templates (black & white)
- AI writing assistant (summary, proofread, improve, translate, tailor, skill gap, interview prep)
- ATS score checker
- Job matching analysis
- PDF export
- Public portfolio page with shareable link
- CV authenticity verification
- Cloud storage via Firebase
- Dark mode & light mode
- Bilingual (Arabic/English)

Pages
-----
- / - Landing page with pricing, features, testimonials
- /editor.html - CV editor with AI tools
- /ats-checker.html - Free ATS score checker
- /templates.html - Browse all CV templates
- /pay.html - Subscription plans & payment
- /blog.html - Career advice blog (12+ articles in Arabic)
- /login.html - User login & registration
- /about.html - About QCV
- /help.html - Help center
- /careers.html - Job listings
- /verify.html - CV authenticity verification
- /privacy.html - Privacy policy
- /terms.html - Terms of service
